hotel_name: Lang Cô Bay Retreat (LANGCO BAY RETREAT)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I left after 2 days no services  at all pictures are fake and  food are very bad
reviews.room_type: Villa, 2 Bedrooms, Private Pool, Garden View

reviews.title: Depressing. Bait and switch. Nothing like photos.
reviews.positives: The staff tried their best to make us comfortable when I was very sick with food poisoning. Unfortunately they were very intrusive walking into our villa un announced multiple times, constant calling on the phone when I was trying to rest. They were very sweet but no boundaries and unfortunately the stay away a nightmare start to finish.
reviews.negatives:
Knew we were in trouble when there were only 5 other guests on the entire resort. 

The grounds were dirty. Masks, bottles, bottle caps strewn everywhere. Filthy beach with no effort to clean their section beachfront. No beach chairs pulled up for use, they were all up a small bluff and out of reach? 

Private room pools all in bad repair. After switching rooms because of our view of wire fence and burning trash next door, The hot water didn’t work in our new room which required more employees in and out for an hour. 

The room service ordering system didn’t work on the tv so they sent someone to our who spoke absolutely zero English or even translate me pouting at the menu, who took 10 minutes to take our order. After the “French toast” and eggs we ordered arrived, it was literally…literally 4 pieces of uncooked dry bread on a plate and 4 eggs. Not even butter jam or jelly let alone maple syrup that we ordered. I called to let them know, so now a food and beverage manager had to show up to tell us French toast was unavailable. I pointed to the eggs and the toast and said that’s the ingredients right there. How is it not available? Reaching a dead end we ordered a hamburger at 9:30 am. 

There is an ugly wire fence between all beachfront villas and the beach so not only are you staring at it, you cannot access the beach without walking a hundred yards around it in some cases. The landscaping was in horrible repair with trees cut bluntly off 10’ up or so. No pride in the ground maintenance whatsoever. It also smelled of burning trash. It was a really bad scene and couldn’t leave soon enough. 

It was one of the worse hospitality experiences I’ve had. We had travel for leisure no less than 15 times a year and this was bad bad.  We stayed one of our 4 nights scheduled and traveled while having a 103 degree temperature just to get away from this place. 
The front desk staff was very, very kind.

reviews.title: Requested a refund
reviews.text: This place is isolated, run down and very limited facilities. I would not recommend that you stay here, there is much better place that actually have things to do, places to walk to, where your not looking at old, cracked, rusted buildings. The pool was the only facility we could use there and that area was closed due to renovation
reviews.room_type: Villa 1 Bedroom Garden View 1 King Bed

reviews.title: feel cheated and we overpaid for what we got. it is not a 5-star property ...
reviews.positives:
The staff provided excellent, truly 5-star service. Unfortunately, the room and facilities did not meet the same standard. Overall, I would rate the property closer to 3.5 stars.

The room design was poorly thought out in several ways. I was surprised to learn the property has only been operating since 2024, as the design and setup feel much older—more like something built over 10 years ago.

We chose this hotel expecting a 5-star experience, but it was disappointing. There were multiple design flaws: power switches were awkwardly placed, wardrobe doors obstructed both the room and bathroom access, and the bathtub was unstable and not properly fixed to the floor. The bathtub faucet was too short to use comfortably for showering (and I’m only 173cm tall), and the plumbing was exposed and poorly finished. The outdoor shower also lacked ceiling lighting.

The gym was another letdown. It was poorly equipped, with hand weights only going up to 6kg. Some equipment did not function properly, and certain pieces didn’t feel safe to use.

Overall, I’m not sure how this property received a 5-star rating. Given the price we paid, we felt disappointed and misled. I would value this property closer to AU$80 per night and would not return.

For comparison, we stayed at Melia Vinpearl properties in several cities during our trip and received much better value and quality at a lower nightly rate.
reviews.negatives: only staff were ok the rest were dissappointing...

reviews.title: Location really bad
reviews.text: The location of resort is really bad. The resort in itself is good but barely any activities and only one restaurant not much vegetarian food available.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We stayed in the beach front villa which is very large , comfortable for our family of four. Good breafast . Hotel is close to Lap An Lagoon, a must destination if visit Lang Co

reviews.title: Too Far from both Danang and Hoi An
reviews.text:
If going only pay 1 night upfront, we were unable to use the beach and that is why the location was booked. It was also far from both Danang and Hoi An. 
Hotel didn’t offer any compensation just reminded us it was a non refundable payment. Had we been aware we were unable to use the beach we wouldn’t have booked time there. Check with the property when the beach will be reopened if ever as it appears it will be a long time before you will be able to access it.
We expected they would offer us 50% back but we just got a transfer to another hotel in Hoi An.. Disappointed.
reviews.room_type: Two Bedroom Villa Private Pool Ocean View

reviews.title: We will come back again.
reviews.positives:
Everything you need is available. You can rent a car with a driver to get to the city. We used the laundry service, and everything was handled carefully.
Housekeeping is done daily, always neat and clean. Every day they brought mandarins to our room, which was very nice gesture.
The minibar prices were surprisingly reasonable, with a fairly low markup.
The pools are clean, both the shared one and the private one in the room.
Special thanks to the staff — attentive and friendly. We stayed for 10 days, and it was wonderful. They remembered us, and we got to know many of them as well. It felt like home.
The restaurant serves very tasty food, both at breakfast and from the menu.

The hotel grounds are very beautiful.
The rooms are conveniently located and well organized.
One of our room’s windows faced the ocean, which was amazing.

We could easily stay here to live 😁
reviews.negatives:
It is difficult to get a taxi, as the location is far from Da Nang and drivers often cancel the ride. However, the hotel offers car rental with a driver.
We stayed before the start of the season, so not all leisure areas were fully prepared. In particular, there was some trash on the beach that had not been cleaned.
The kitchen furniture in the room is slightly worn and shows some signs of use.

reviews.title: In my personal opinion, the hotel's situation is precarious, even so, the staff are always attentive.
reviews.text:
We stayed at Langco Bay for 12 days. Unfortunately, the swimming pool — one of the hotel’s main advertised features — was not operating during our stay. It was clearly in poor condition and had been deactivated.

The spa area lacked proper cleanliness and felt outdated, giving the impression of an old facility that has not been well maintained.

In addition, the breakfast service was changed from buffet style to à la carte without any prior notice, which is a significant disappointment for guests who prefer a buffet experience.

The hotel also had recurring issues with hot water. Because of this, we had to stay at another hotel in order to take a proper shower and eat well. This situation occurred twice during our 12-day stay, which negatively affected our overall comfort and experience.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room

reviews.title: A beautiful resort, in a low-touristed, much lesser developed area than Da Nang or An Bang (Hoi An), with a fabulous mai
reviews.positives: Very nice room (801B) overlooking a garden towards the beach. Pool was magnificent!!! Breakfast excellent, and restaurant staff were friendly. Beach area was very clean, and swimming area was well marked. Several excellent dining options within walking distance outside of the Retreat.
reviews.negatives:
Hotel did not provide currency exchange, nor change larger to smaller denominations — so future guests should be prepared for that.
Although the Retreat has bicycles for guest use, they did not stipulate that guests could not use them outside of the Retreat — where the best areas to cycle are. We only were told that on Day 2, after we had ridden into the local community and along the lagoon the day before. We were however able to convince management that we were prepared to take the risk of riding outside the Retreat, so it really is not their responsibility, to which they reluctantly agreed and so we rode into Lang Co and along the lagoon once again. In other words, we did not take “No” for an answer.
The beach area was nicely kept, however future guests should be aware that there are very few chairs and umbrellas set up, so seeking shade could be a challenge.

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: Insufficient service. They don’t allow you to bring outside food or drinks inside the villa penalty is 2 mil VND, which is ridiculous. They implementing this to force you to purchase their dinner package. This wasn’t clearly explained to our group upon check in.

reviews.title: Đẹp nhưng dịch vụ chưa tương xứng
reviews.text:
- Bãi biển đẹp, cát trắng, sóng êm, nhưng dịch vụ xung quanh chưa nhiều, chưa đồng bộ. Muốn ăn uống bên ngoài xung quanh thì khu không cho dịch vụ xe điện ra khỏi khu, các hàng quán dịch vụ xung quanh chưa nhiều và chưa đạt tiêu chuẩn cao. Đi lại trong khu vực phải qua đường quốc lộ 1A rất nhiều xe tải nên không an toàn lắm.
- Khu nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao nhưng chất lượng và dịch vụ chỉ tầm 3-4 sao.
- Villa rộng, đẹp, nhưng đồ nội thất chưa tương ứng 5 sao: nền gỗ còn ọp ẹp, thiết bị vệ sinh trung bình khá, một số vòi xịt trong villa còn yếu nước.
- Chăn ga đệm không sạch: nằm 2 đêm xong bị mẩn ngứa khắp người, không phải một người mà có đến 3-4 người trong đoàn bị ngứa.
- Đồ ăn sáng: các món bánh mì ngon,  còn các món xào, rang, hấp không ấn tượng và không đặc sắc
reviews.room_type: Three Bedroom Villa with Garden

reviews.title: Relax with great service
reviews.positives: Great place to retreat.  The staff were all wonderful, especially the massage and spa team.  Highly recommend getting a massage here!

reviews.title: A deserted hotel
reviews.text:
This could be my worst experience in any hotel. Staff are very nice and helpful but this hotel is nothing like it was advertised. We booked a two bedroom beach pool villa yes it is indeed a beachfront pool villa but there is an awkward partition in the middle of the villa making it look like two separate living rooms. Staff told us it was for the privacy of their guests. People who book this kind of villas are usually families/ friends that want to share a living room together so I don’t understand how the partition is necessary when guests get their own bedrooms.

What’s WORST:  I’ve communicated with the hotel prior to my visit asking what kind of activities are available at the hotel for booking. They told me “ For the water activities, we have beach soccer, beach volleyball, fly kite and some activities that have fee like water skiing, sup and so on. ” And tennis court with a coach service available. After we have checked in, they told us none of these activities are available “due to weather condition” which is total BS. As shown in the pictures, weather was sublime and water was calm. My guess is that they just stop providing these services due to low occupancy which is absurd. 

Although the villa itself (aside from the partition) is nice, we are super disappointed as there is nothing we can do here at the resort (other than spa and a small gym).

reviews.title: Preferiria otro sitio
reviews.positives:
La vila es muy espaciosa.
La piscina estaba bien y el desayuno también.
reviews.negatives: Estuvimos en una vila, que estaba muy bien, pero las instalaciones alrededor estaban bastante descuidadas. El personal es relativamente atento, pero no respeta absolutamente el orden de llegada a cualquier servicio.

reviews.title: Welcome to the Langco Bay JUNGLE!
reviews.text: Stayed 2 nights on the last week of July. Upon arrival at 3pm there were over 50-60 guests in the reception. Lots of them were children running around and screaming and shouting. Even the adults were shouting loudly to each other over the sound of their own screaming kids. Breakfast was no different. Was hoping to sit outside where it would be quieter but people were smoking outside at the dining tables. They should restrict this. The village room was OK. Nothing fancy. The hot water for the bathtub required a separate switch to be turned on. They should write up an explanation for this. After 5 minutes of filling up the bathtub the hot water ran out. Tried again in 15 minutes. Hot water came out but soon turned cold. I booked the room with the bathtub but in the end could not use it. The 1.2 M high pool was nice, though it didnt have 100% privacy as the shrubs were not thick enough and we could see people swimming in the pool beside us. Also our pool was along the walkway to the beach. During the day staff were working on a new fence and you can hear them talking/laughing loudly. The worse thing was that through the Saturday people on the beach were playing games (musical chairs?) with loud  music. And even at 10pm there was a loud thumping coming from the other side of the villa. I called reception and they said not to worry and hung up. The music continued throughout the night.  The next day I hard the music again and went to check to see that it was coming from across the road. I called to make sure that I could sleep that night. As I didnt want to walk into the dining jungle we tried to order room service from the tv screen but it was not functioning at all on the 3 different tvs we had. I had to call 3 times to get a menu. Ordered fish and chips, calamari and a quattro cheese pizza. Even though the menu said the fish and chips would come with tartar sauce, it ended up being just mayonnaise. Calamari was overcooked and chewy. Pizza was passable and luckily there was a microwave to warm it up into a nice cheesy pizza. The pina colad with light rum was correct in that you couldnt even taste the rum. Monday morning breakfast was a little more peaceful with most of the noisy groups already checked out. The beach was nice with sand stretching all the way towards the deep part of the ocean. And there was hardly any garbage. Only wish that the lifeguard/surfing guy would not smoke on the beach and then put it out into the sand. WTF man. I thought this was a secluded retreat with a nice quiet beach side but NOPE! Wont recommend coming here unless summer is over and no large groups or kids would stay here. Also I thought there would be less locals and more foreign tourists. Lastly it is difficult to get a GRAB to and from here. It seems the GRAB FEE of 400,000VND is too low, plus you have to pay 100,000VND to go through the tunnel. Going back to the airport there is no fee. Also the alchol here is fairly high. Ended up walking across the street to this open type store that sells nice cold Huda and local white wine ( 100,000VND) for the bottle and lots of instant noodles. Owner has passable English and is patient and kind. Recommend going here for your drinks if you decide to stay here. Didnt visit the seafood restaurants across the street as the reviews said they charge more for tourists and also there is no English menus nor pricing.... sorry for the long write up but hope its useful IF you are going to stay here.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Wayne,
First of all, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience that you might have during your stay with us. Our customers' satisfaction is always our top priority. reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Amplia habitación. Todo muy nuevo y limpio. Cómodo. Buen desayuno. Playa poco concurrida de arena fina aunque en algunos tramos algo sucia.

reviews.title: Resort vị trí đẹp nhưng chất lượng khá thấp
reviews.text:
Resort mới khai trương có vị trí khá đẹp, các villa rộng rãi nhưng hầu như không có sân vườn nên không nhìn ra đâu cả. Nhiều villa sát đường quốc lộ 1 nên rất ồn vì xe qua lại liên tục.

Villa được hoàn thiện bằng các vật liệu rất rẻ tiền như kiểu điều hòa Midea nên chất lượng rất thấp, vệ sinh kém nên sàn nhà và đồ đạc khá bẩn.

Sân vườn khá nhiều cây xanh mát  nhưng vẫn có những đống gạch, đống cát, bao tải dọc 1 số lối đi.

Hai bể bơi to không bị mùi hóa chất nhưng bị nhiều cát ở đáy bể. Bể bơi không có khăn tắm. Bãi biển thoải, nước trong, nhìn lên núi rất đẹp.

Đồ ăn sáng phong phú, ngon, ăn sáng đến 10h nhưng tầm 9h là nhiều đồ ăn bị hết. Nhân viên nhà hàng rất ít nên bát đũa ăn buffet không có ai dọn. Nhân viên pha chế đồ uống dửng dưng khi khách hỏi xin thêm trà.

Tóm lại là gia đình mình không thể quay lại.
reviews.response:
Xin chào THANH,
Xin chân thành cảm ơn úy khách và gia đình đã tin tưởng lựa chọn LangCo Bay Retreat là điểm đến cho kỳ nghỉ của mình. Những lời nhận xét của quý khách là nguồn động lực to lớn để đội ngũ nhân viên khu nghỉ dưỡng cố gắng hết mình hoàn thiện dịch vụ và mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tốt nhất.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc về một vài vấn đề làm mình chưa hài lòng trong quá trình lưu trú. Những thông tin trên đều đã được chuyển đến bộ phận có liên quan để có những thay đổi cải thiện.
Hy vọng sẽ được chào đón quý khách cùng gia đình trở lại trong một dịp gần nhất. 
Trân trọng,

Trần Thị Thùy Dung (Ms.)
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Location is great. Beautiful views. 
Pool bar is closed. No service at outside pool areas. Hard to find people to get drinks. Have to pay as you go. No charging back to rooms.
Beach front villa pool lights not working. No privacy. Pool so cold could not really use it. Have to use main pool.
Room not cleaned on second day. Had to call reception to get room cleaned. 
Food is exceptional. 
Says 5 star. But honestly these things let it down. We just came from a 5 star hotel in Hoi An that made this property look worse than a 3 star. And to be honest we probably got better service at the other 3 star properties we stayed at.
Beds are rock hard. 
Facilities in room are sufficient and rooms are very nice. 
Definitely won't be back unfortunately.

reviews.title: Nous avons passé un séjour super mémorable. Le personnel était adorable. Nous y retournerons.
reviews.positives: Nous avions opté pour le service navette de l'aéroport vers l'hôtel et rien à dire, parfait. Le logement est très propre et l'hôtel est très bien entretenu. La piscine privative était un bon choix car arrivé en période pluvieuse, les enfants n'auraient pas pu sinon nager dans la piscine de l'hôtel :-). La salle de sport est assez petite mais tranquille. Nous avons goûté aux plats du restaurant de l'hôtel le soir de notre arrivée car il était tard. Les plats étaient savoureux et le service au top. Le buffet petit déjeuner offrait un large choix.
reviews.negatives: Ce n'est pas une critique mais plutôt une anecdote. Les enfants voulaient essayer les vélos de l'hôtel. Malheureusement ce jour-là il n'en restait que 2 et pas "vraiment" neufs. La personne qui nous a remis les vélos s'en excusait mais les enfants se sont bien amusé à faire le tour de la propriété.

reviews.title: 3-night, 4-day family trip
reviews.text:
We went on a family trip including children. 
First of all, there is no DROP service after a massage in downtown Da Nang. The distance is quite far, and when using Grab to move from near My Khe Beach, it came out to nearly 800,000 VND. The travel time was just over an hour.
I mention the travel time and cost first because the biggest downside of this place is the distance and cost of transportation. You have to go through a tunnel that passes through the mountains, which costs 108,000 VND. However, there are hardly any Grab drivers who take this price as is. Since the distance is far, it seems they charge a premium.
The advantage is that you can relax in a spacious and clean pool villa in a quiet area for a reasonable price. There is a private pool where you can play with your child even at a late hour, and you can also enjoy relaxation at the two main pools.
Since it is mainly used by foreigners and locals, you won't run into many Koreans. During our stay, we were the only Koreans there.
There are no cooking utensils in the villa, only a microwave and an electric kettle. There are no cooking tools, and preparing food is prohibited.
They clean every day, and the staff are all friendly, but there are few employees who can communicate in English.
The breakfast has a strong local feel, with a small bread corner. There is one kimchi.
The kids' café is a small single room.
There is a sea in front of the main pool, but we did not go in. The sand looks fine and the water level is not high, making it seem good for playing, but there are a lot of debris like wood.
Since there are mountains nearby, there are some bugs, but not many disgusting ones. We only saw one large spider during our stay. There are mosquitoes and cockroaches.
Finally, I recommend this place for those who want to rent a cost-effective pool villa to relax and enjoy water activities in a less crowded area. The sound of the sea is nice, the view is good, and although the facilities are a bit old, they are relatively clean.

reviews.title: It was a clean and really nice accommodation. If it improves just a bit more, I would like to go again next time.
reviews.text:
The off-peak season for traveling to Vietnam has started, and since it was a weekday, there were hardly any guests in the resort, so we could relax comfortably as if we had rented the place entirely. I was really worried because there were not many reviews from Koreans, but I was happy to stay at a very good accommodation at a reasonable price. The bed was quite firm, but since I don’t prefer soft beds, I could rest very well. Every morning, they changed the water in the room pool and cleaned it, so there were no bugs at all, which was really nice. The shared pool was also well-maintained, as there were never any leaves whenever we visited, which surprised me. Although we couldn’t go to the beach due to the rough waves of the rainy season, the beach looked clean and nice.

However, the location is far from downtown Da Nang, so you have to resolve everything within the resort. The variety of meals is quite limited, which made the food somewhat repetitive, and although this is typical for the Lang Co area, every time we went to downtown Da Nang, we had to pay for the tunnel toll and taxi fare, which took about an hour.

I thought there would be something nearby, but there were no Grab or grocery deliveries at all. It would have been nice if there was at least a convenience store; I was really disappointed about that, so I deducted one star. However, since the accommodation hasn’t been open for long, I believe the number of menu options will gradually increase.

The check-in time is specified as 3 PM, but since we went during a period with no guests, we arrived at 1 PM and were allowed to check in immediately without any additional charges, so we could relax comfortably.

The staff were very friendly, and most of them could speak English, but with a strong Vietnamese accent, so communicating via translation app seemed more convenient.^^

I highly recommend this place for those who want to relax without doing anything in a pool villa, especially those like me who are happy anywhere as long as there’s water. Haha.

One thing that I found somewhat unsatisfactory is that the shower facilities are outdoors. The lights don’t turn on (probably due to bugs). So, it’s a bit scary to wash at night, which was uncomfortable... Though after a few days, I got used to it. Haha. It’s somewhat enclosed by walls, but there are openings, and when it rains, things can get in, and bugs also come in very occasionally, so it would be good to be aware of this.

reviews.title: I don't think I'm going to go for number 2.
reviews.text:
I planned a trip to Da Nang and booked a pool villa for 150,000 won for 2 nights. Before booking, I knew that the location was around Lang Co Beach, which takes about 40 minutes to the city by car, and I think it’s a good value to be able to relax with the kids while enjoying the pool villa with breakfast included for that price. The distance is a downside, but I don’t think it’s a significant one. Since we visited to relax and enjoy the quietness with fewer people, I believe whether that's a downside is subjective. 

Moving tips:
The accommodation provides one free pick-up and drop-off. We used InDrive. It cost 410,000 VND from the city, including a toll of 110,000 VND. Grab is more expensive. The exact toll is 108,000 VND, but some drivers charge 200,000 VND for the toll. We used InDrive for going there and requested a free drop-off to a hotel in the city after check-out. A Benz SUV arrived for comfortable transport with a driver in a resort uniform. 

We bought food for two days at Lotte Mart and ate well at the resort. There’s a 2 million VND fine for cooking smelly food. We mainly ate bread, snacks, instant noodles, kimchi, and beer. There were fewer than 10 guests in the entire accommodation, and we saw one Korean team. 

The main downside is that there aren't many places to have dinner near the accommodation. There is a restaurant called Nhà Hàng Hải Sản Bé Thân - Lăng Cô nearby with good Google reviews, which I recommend for seafood. It’s hard to get a Grab. The restaurant is a 10-minute walk away. 

There are many large trucks in front of the resort, and it's dangerous to cross the street as you would in the city. Make sure to check for cars before crossing. 

Additionally, since there were few guests at the resort, they didn't operate the breakfast buffet, so we had to order from the menu, including items like pho and eggs, which were freshly made and delicious, although there weren’t many options. 

Room service was not very good for the pizza, morning glory, and pineapple fried rice. I received a 200,000 VND coupon from the resort, and I ended up paying a total of 760,000 VND. I used a Toss card. 

Overall evaluation for Korean visitors:
It's good value for money and great for a quiet retreat. The accommodation is clean. Since there are few guests, they don’t operate a breakfast buffet, so it’s individual menu items. You need to buy food from Lotte Mart, and there are not enough restaurants for dinner. Please keep this in mind.

reviews.title: Da Nang's Best Healing
reviews.text:
This resort is located in the Lang Co area, a bit away from the city center of Da Nang, and it is really great for healing in a quiet and peaceful atmosphere. We stayed in the **Ocean View Private Pool Villa (220m²)**, and the open sea view and private pool were truly impressive, making it perfect for enjoying a private relaxation.

All the staff were very kind and attentive, which allowed us to feel good throughout our stay. In particular, the attitude and skills of the spa staff were impressive, and the spa itself had a high quality.

The cleanliness and facility management of the room were perfect, and it was spacious and comfortable, leaving us very satisfied. The breakfast was delicious and varied, but there were almost no restaurants around the resort, so it was somewhat inconvenient to find meals outside. This may limit menu choices as you often have to dine within the resort.

Still, I think it is the best choice if you want to relax deeply in a serene and private atmosphere. It is a resort I would definitely like to visit again next time 🌊💆🏻‍♀️✨

reviews.title: Quiet and Peaceful with stunning views
reviews.text:
Location - it’s situated is lan co area which is around 50 min from Danang. The location is not very touristy but if you’re looking for peace good view, sea mountains around. It’s perfect. Most of the tourist attraction is min 50 min away.
Room- Room is spacious well lit with natural sunlight perfect for couples or family. I had garden view room and it was Beautiful. It has toiletries, hair dryer but doesn’t have iron
Cleanliness - it’s the first thing I notice whenever I stay anywhere and this resort made me very happy. It was super clean, well maintained. Beach pool and dining area was also clean 10/10
Food- we didn’t eat non-veg as no halal option was there so comments are based on veg option. Food was very basic, croissants/ cinnamon rolls didn’t feel very fresh. We mostly had egg fried rice or veg noodles everyday.  Coffee was good. Seasonal fruits and juices were there

Beaches pool - nice and clean pools and very clean beach.

Spa- masseuses were well trained very polite. My massage was very relaxing

Extra - they offered golf cart and bicycle to roam around property and can arrange cabs on request.

Kids play area available 

Staff - polite and courteous. 

I only had annoying incident. My second last day When I returned to resort at night I couldn’t find my white t-shirt I looked everywhere as I was packing for next day checkout.  When I couldn’t find I informed reception suspecting housekeeping might have picked it up by towels or sheets. They found it in few of hours
They didn’t explain what happened but the least they could have done it is to wash it return.

However, dinner was disappointing. We tried it once and didn’t return—the prices were high, but the food didn’t match the standards of a five-star hotel. The spa (with a discount) is worth a visit, though it’s unlikely to exceed expectations. We also played tennis, which was very affordable and enjoyable.

The biggest downside is the location—it’s quite dull, with little to do in the area except for a few seafood restaurants. If you’re looking for a lively atmosphere, this might not be the best choice.

Great staff, relaxing getaway 
Points I hope you can improve:
1. There should be an iron for guests; guests mainly stay to take pictures, and without an iron, clothes are wrinkled, which is very inconvenient.
2. The pool should be checked daily; although there is a continuous water filtration system, there are eggs (?) accumulating at the edges of the pool, so my family was very hesitant to swim, fearing it was unhygienic.
3. The buffet line should be more diverse; a 5-star hotel's food selection is limited and the food isn't special.
4. Nevertheless, I still highly appreciate the hospitality of the staff here; it truly feels like a relaxing getaway, and I felt very comfortable. I will definitely recommend it.

reviews.title: About a 30 to 40 minute distance.
reviews.text: It takes about 30-40 minutes by car from Da Nang, which seems closer than Hoi An. You can enjoy riding bicycles inside the hotel. The breakfast is chosen from a menu, which is a bit disappointing. The chicken breast porridge is delicious, with plenty of chicken breast. It would have been even better if there had been a mini salad bar. The accommodation cost is really great in terms of price. Also, the staff are very sincere, responsible, and really nice. We played at the pool until late, and the staff kept patrolling the area with flashlights. The female staff member at the pool who was wearing a yellow t-shirt had a very nice impression and was kind, so I appreciated it. By the way, if you go out of the hotel and walk left for about 5-10 minutes, there is a local market and supermarket. If you ask the lobby to call a taxi, it costs about 4,000 won round trip. They wait for you while you shop. Most importantly, the private pool staff come early the next morning to remove the leaves that fell overnight and change the water. I should have tipped that person but I couldn't. If anyone reads my review and goes, please do it on my behalf!

reviews.positives: This is a very nice resort with a great and relaxed atmosphere. Our 3-bedroom villa was gorgeous. Staff was fantastic. Breakfast was excellent.
reviews.negatives:
We had a lovely stay, but we do have a few suggestions for small improvements. 
The villa had three terasses, but they are apparantly only for decoration, not for use. If they had some furniture, a sun bed and a parasol, you could actually use them. 
The villa also had a small kitchen, but it was useless since there was no equipment whatsoever. 
The priorities of house keeping were strange, e.g. they would come to change towels (even though the sign said that they would not be changed, if we left them on the rack, which we did) and make the beds, but would leave dirt on the floor, dirty dishes and not refill toilet paper. 
Sustainability awareness is a bit higher than other hotels in Vietnam, but there is still a long way to go, e.g. complimentary water is provided in six small bottles per day. Why not two larger bottles or even just a water post?

reviews.title: Honest review of a 6-night, 7-day vacation for relaxation purposes.
reviews.text:
It's only been two days since I returned from my trip, so I wrote this seriously, in detail, and honestly. (Emotional immersion)

🏝 Travel
1. Purpose of the trip: Relaxation
2. Participants: 2 people
3. Duration: Medium to long-term (6 nights and 7 days)

📍 Accommodation
1. Cleanliness: 95
- Due to the wide management area of the resort, cleanliness isn't maintained at 100% like a hotel, but they do their best to keep it as clean as possible to reach that level. (There were occasionally some disappointing areas, like the walls where water touches.)
- Bedding: Changed daily.
- Bathroom: The toilet and washing area are separate. The toilet cleanliness is average, and the shower is an outdoor booth connected to the toilet. The top is slightly open, allowing small bugs to occasionally come in. I didn’t see any walking around, but there were 1-2 instances of them being stuck in the bathtub the next day.
2. Soundproofing: 80
There is some interference from noise between living rooms. The bedroom is well soundproofed, overlapping with the bathroom and wardrobe.
(The requested room was not a completely independent villa, but rather a connected one with another room.)
(It was a garden view, but I could hear the sound of waves from the bathroom. If it had been a sea view, I would expect to hear the waves. The waves were relatively rough compared to other beaches.)
3. Heating/Cooling: 100
I visited during a season of about 33 degrees, and the air conditioning was turned on before check-in and worked well continuously.
4. View: 75
Since it was a garden view room, it is obscured by small landscaped trees and grass, but it's not 100% private. If someone approaches a bit closer than the road with intention, they can be seen. The view was so-so.
5. Water pressure: 40
On the weaker side. (Not so weak that it's impossible to wash, but somewhat disappointing.)
6. Hot water: 30
Ah… this part is ambiguous, but as someone who enjoys hot baths, while there is hot water, it diminishes gradually. To fill the bathtub to a hot water level, I had to turn it on for 5 minutes, pause for 5 minutes, and turn it on again, which was a bit of a hassle.
7. Bathroom amenities: 80
Average with shampoo, body wash, hand wash, disposable toothbrush, toothpaste, razor, hair accessories, etc.
8. Bed: 100
It’s somewhat hard, but comfortable. Slept well for 6 nights and 7 days.
9. Breakfast: 100
It was the most delicious among places I ate in Da Nang city. (If you're Korean, I recommend adding kimchi to just rice.)
- Room service: It’s a bit pricey compared to Vietnamese prices, but the chef generally cooks well. (Seafood is not recommended.)
Location: 70
- I expected it to take an hour, but it felt like it wasn’t that far from the city center of Da Nang (about 40 minutes, not much different from commuting times).
- Food: There are seafood restaurants across the street that were delicious. Besides that, there are no particular restaurants. There are occasional local shops, but my wife was a bit nervous eating there at night.
- Convenience store/supermarket: About a 10-minute walk from the hotel entrance is an area similar to a local market. At the entrance, there’s a local market, and if you go a little further, there’s a Win mart, which has all the items you would find in a convenience store. (The path to get there is not well paved. There are many trucks and container trucks, so walking can be a bit dangerous. The hotel taxi can wait during shopping, and the round trip cost about 3,000 won. Using that is more comfortable.)
10. Facilities:
- Swimming pool: Clean and large, and because it was off-season, there were no people, so it felt private.
- Spa: A bit on the expensive side, somewhat weak (according to Da Nang city standards). It’s convenient since it’s inside the resort, and they offer buggy rides. Friendly staff with some Korean language capability.
- Fitness: I didn’t use it, but it didn’t seem to be in bad condition regarding cleanliness, and there were no users.
- Restaurant: Neat and cool.
- Parking: If you rent a car, no worries about parking.
- Bank: I only brought cash, so I didn’t see or know the location of the bank or ATM.
(Activity types: swimming pool, fitness, spa, bicycle rentals, swimming assistance machine? (about 20,000 won for 15 minutes, which was quite expensive),

reviews.title: Excellent value for money and very comfortable
reviews.positives: We stayed at Langco Bay Retreat for the first four nights of our trip to Vietnam. We are a family of 5 with 3 teenage daughters. We were looking to relax on a beach before we headed to more touristy destinations and sightseeing. The accommodation is fantastic - we had a 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom villa over two which was very comfortable and spacious. The pool area was very clean and the beach is directly accessible and fantastic. We wandered along the beach to a handful of restaurants to eat. We also ate at the restaurants across the road on the lagoon side. It is very, very rustic outside of the resort but we had fantastic food and very cheap. The resort arranged a driver for the day to show us the sites of Hue and we also had spa treatments. The breakfast buffet is excellent. I would highly recommend if you are looking for a few days of quiet down time in very comfortable surroundings.
reviews.negatives: The mattress was very firm but probably good for our backs after a long flight from the UK.

reviews.title: New beachfront hotel
reviews.text: I stayed for two nights at a villa with a pool. The private pool is spacious enough to enjoy thoroughly. There is plenty of hot water for the shower. The breakfast is also satisfying with a wide variety. Eating at the hotel for lunch or dinner is expensive, so I recommend walking about five minutes to a restaurant along the lagoon. It takes about 45 minutes to get from the hotel to Da Nang Airport by Grab, costing around 500,000 VND. Hoi An is nice, but Lanco has fewer people and beautiful beaches to enjoy. I recommend visiting Lanco when you go to Da Nang.

reviews.title: It is a very satisfactory accommodation.
reviews.text: I chose this accommodation with relaxation in mind and I am very satisfied. I booked a pool villa and the place is spacious and clean compared to the price, which makes me very happy. There are seafood restaurants and cafes nearby, but they're not as numerous as in the city. If you think of enjoying just the resort, I think this is the best value accommodation. I visited with a family of four (two teenagers) and the room and living room kitchen are spacious, with a TV in both the room and the living room (a total of four TVs), and the kids found things to watch on YouTube. I apologize, but there weren't many guests, so I liked it a lot. We were able to use the pool comfortably just among ourselves, and I didn't see a single Korean person. The breakfast was delicious and excellent. I think satisfaction should be considered with the price. For this amount, I believe this is an outstanding accommodation. It's a place I want to recommend to others and I’m satisfied.

reviews.text: 신축이라 그런지 룸 컨디션이 너무 좋네요. 직원들도 과할만큼 친절합니다. 영어를 전혀 못하는 직원들이 있어서 번역앱 꼭 필요하긴 해요. 위치가 외곽에 있어서 인지 투숙객이 별로 없어서 너무 조용하긴 합니다. 조식 땐 몇 팀 봤는데 산책하고 그럴 땐 직원들만 마주쳤네요. 1월이라 해가 쨍쨍할 때 아니면 수영장 이용하기엔 좀 쌀쌀하구요. 프라이빗풀 이용하다가 둘째가 무서워해서  공용풀장에서도 놀았는데 넓고 깨끗합니다. 공용풀은 150, 120, 30cm 가 있어요. 근처에 사시는 그랩 기사님이 있어서 다낭 시내로 갈 땐 쉽게 갔는데 돌아올 땐 계속 콜취소되다가 한시장 근처로 가서 겨우 타고 들어왔습니다. 시내로 가는 길에 유료 터널이 있어서 나갈땐 터널요금 1회분 추가요금 지불했고, 리조트 들어올땐 왕복터널요금 추가해서 그랩탔어요. 리조트에서만 지내면서 휴식취하실 분들에게는 강추입니다.

reviews.text: We stayed with family at the Lang Co Ba Resort for 2 nights, and it was a wonderful experience. The chef and crew, especially Son Tong, were exceptional with their service—attentive, warm, and always willing to go the extra mile. The hospitality truly made our stay memorable. This is definitely a place we look forward to visiting again. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Very perfect
reviews.text: My family stayed at Lăng Cô Bay Retreat for 4 days, and we were very satisfied. The service was good, and the staff was polite and extremely nice. Our family needed to go to the airport around 3 PM, and the resort kindly assisted us with a late check-out, which was very sweet. The restaurant served delicious food; I ordered room service, and the prices were reasonable with generous portions. I would give a score of 10 to the resort, but there's no option for that.

reviews.title: Ideal resort in Lang Co
reviews.text:
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 We went as a group of 5 people and were arranged in a 3-bedroom apartment (using 2 rooms). The clean, modern two-story apartment has a private pool and a lush garden. The living room is spacious, and the bedrooms are airy with air conditioning and fans. The bathroom is well-equipped with both a standing shower and a bathtub, and the toilet is clean.

🌴 The resort offers various types of apartments, including a one-story apartment with a pool overlooking the sea. The entire area is covered in greenery, well-maintained, creating a sense of peace and relaxation.

🤝 The staff is enthusiastic, friendly, and thoughtful. The electric car service for transporting people and luggage is very convenient. I encountered a few minor issues that were quickly resolved by calling the front desk.

🏖️ The resort is located close to the beach, with clear water, making it great to swim while admiring the distant mountains. The breakfast buffet is diverse with many delicious dishes; even during low occupancy, the resort was well-prepared.

⭐ An ideal vacation spot in Lang Co – I will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Good!
reviews.text:
Beautiful beach, shallow, blue water, fine white sand, distant mountains overlapping...

The villa is decent, the private pool is large and the two shared pools are also very big.

The guest density is very low, so swimming in the sea is comfortable, there’s no crowd, sometimes it feels like you have the entire resort to yourself.

Breakfast is acceptable if you are not too picky, the downside is that it's far from the center so there are few restaurants around.

The positive point is that the Vietnamese food at the resort's restaurant is also not too expensive!
reviews.room_type: Two Bedroom Villa Private Pool Ocean View

reviews.title: I spent my time well just relaxing.
reviews.text:
Perfect private retreat, 100% willingness to revisit

The facilities are really clean and pleasant. Since it is a newly opened accommodation, everything feels new, and the hygiene condition was also very good. Not a single ant was seen.

The accommodation layout is excellent. There are two living rooms, two bedrooms, and two bathrooms with bathtubs (one of which includes an outdoor shower), as well as a generously sized swimming pool. In front of the pool, there are a small bar table and two sunbeds, and with tubes provided, it was perfect for water activities. Each room has its own refrigerator, ensuring enough personal space with companions, making it perfectly suited for a relaxing vacation that values privacy.

Due to the characteristics of the Lanco area, delivery food is not available, but the room service food was really delicious, which made it even more satisfying. The massage was very satisfying as well; the water for soaking my feet was a bit warm, but other than that, it felt comfortable and professional. Thanks to that, I felt so relaxed during the massage that I kept dozing off.

Transferring to the breakfast or massage location was very convenient with the buggy car, and overall, the flow and service were well organized.

As long as you keep in mind that delivery is not available, this place offers a truly perfect relaxation experience. I definitely want to visit again.

reviews.title: A Serene stay with Private Pool and Beach
reviews.text:
I recently had the opportunity to stay at this enchanting hotel, and it was truly a haven of tranquility. Nestled away from the hustle and bustle of the city, this resort offers a serene escape that rejuvenates both body and soul.

The cleanliness of the hotel was impeccable, with every area meticulously maintained to ensure a comfortable stay. The rooms were spotless, and the attention to detail in keeping everything clean was evident throughout the property.

One of the highlights of my stay was the quiet atmosphere that pervades the entire resort. It was a welcome respite from the noise and chaos of city life, allowing me to unwind and relax in peace.

The private pool was a delight, offering a secluded spot to soak up the sun or take a refreshing dip. The pool area was beautifully landscaped, creating a picturesque setting that felt like a private paradise.

But what truly sets this hotel apart is its stunning private beach. With crystal-clear waters and soft, golden sand, it was the perfect place to spend a day lounging in the sun or taking a leisurely stroll along the shoreline. The seclusion of the beach made it feel like my own personal haven, far removed from the crowds and noise of public beaches.

Overall, I highly recommend this hotel to anyone seeking a peaceful retreat with luxurious amenities. The combination of its clean facilities, quiet atmosphere, and exclusive access to a private pool and beach makes it an ideal destination for those looking to escape the stresses of city life.

reviews.title: Perfect Getaway for the whole family
reviews.text: We dearly loved our stay. Food was great--my Vietnamese mother felt it was the best tasting food since we arrived from the United States (We had been in Hanoi and surrounding areas for over a week.) Super clean everything. The kindest staff imaginable.   Location is close to Hue, about 45 mins from the Danang airport. When we came to this realization , I was disappointed at first. But it was fine for us bc my parents caught a cold so the tranquility combined with the complimentary steam/saunas did her a wealth of good. The villa we stayed in was very spacious with a downstairs master suite that was perfect for my parents. My two tweens were very happy with their their own pool. We traveled in the summer so a private pool is worth it, especially if you have kids. I loved that we were supporting the local economy. The town's name means Village of the Cranes. I think it was their nesting home. The staff seemed kind and gentle just like the town's namesake. We enjoyed every moment and took the time to convalesce between the busy travel schedules of Hanoi and Saigon. Would love to return one day.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: The 5-star resorts in Lang Co have quite high prices. Initially, I was very hesitant when choosing Langco Bay Retreat, the price was very okay but there were many low ratings. However, my family really had a wonderful holiday. The staff were very polite to guests. When my family arrived, everyone was hot and tired, but upon entering the room we were very surprised because the room had been prepared, with the air conditioning already turned on. I rented a 2-bedroom sea view unit. Every bedroom has large glass doors for ventilation. The living room is covered in green. Each room has a TV with internet. A microwave is available in the room, which is very convenient when traveling with small children. For lunch, my family ordered meals directly from the resort and the staff served it to our room. The large living room has a very convenient dining table. The private pool has a direct view of the sea and is very relaxing. Overall, there is nothing to criticize given the very reasonable price. It is only half the cost of high-end resorts in the area when renting a 2-bedroom unit. If I could add a suggestion, I would just hope the resort improves the breakfast buffet to be more diverse. Oh, one more thing, this area is very spacious with a lot of scenery for you to take photos. It’s very beautiful. I am very grateful to the many staff members here even though I don’t know their names. Thank you to the person in charge of the kids' playroom, even though my child was the only one playing, you turned on the air conditioning for the child. Thank you to the two gentlemen who took care of the trees; when they saw my family taking pictures while cleaning the plants, they proactively sat down in the bushes so as not to disturb the guests taking photos. I highly appreciate all of that. My family will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Lovely big villa
reviews.text:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in the 3 bedroom villa with a private pool.
 The private pool was accessible via the ground floor bedroom. - 
It would be great to see access to the pool villa via the living room area (rather than one of the bedrooms).  
Appreciated that they also included various sized life jackets - was very useful for the kids. 
The pool depth (1.2m) was perfect. 

The larger pools in the resort were also nice with a good depth. 

The villa was bigger than expected and each room in the villa was like it's own ensuite hotel room including a bathtub. Each room also had their own individual card access. The smart TVs in each room were great too.

The staff were very attentive and friendly, we requested some bikes which were provided and each time we had something to do at the reception area we were served with a signature orange and cinnamon welcome drink which was very refreshing in the hot weather! 

The breakfast buffet was good, there was the usual good variety of food with some nice unique cake options too. 

The view of the mountains was beautiful and it's a very short walk to the nearby lagoon where there are sea food restaurants. 


Overall we would definitely return and would recommend a stay here!

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Lang Co Bay Retreat.

reviews.title: Komfortabel aber in den Details nicht zu Ende gedacht
reviews.text:
Das Hotel ist relativ neu, trotzdem schon massive Abnutzungserscheinungen dem Meer geschuldet, wirkt daher leicht ungepflegt. Sehr großzügige Räumlichkeiten, aber  kühl eingerichtet. Einrichtung wirkt im ersten Moment edel, ist aber an vielen Stellen nicht zu Ende gedacht. Zum Beispiel ist das Bad riesig, aber es gibt für 2 Personen nur je ein großes Handtuch, Dusche und Badewanne sind außen angebaut, wirkt merkwürdig, scharfe Kanten und sehr rutschig im Poolbereich. Die Lage ist fantastisch wenn man Einsamkeit und Ruhe sucht. 
Das Personal ist sehr nett und bemüht, spricht aber kaum Englisch.
Wir kamen spät an und konnten nur noch Essen aufs Zimmer bestellen, das Geschirr wurde bis zu unserer Abreise (2 Nächte) nicht abgeholt. 
Hotel hauptsächlich von Asiaten frequentiert. Interessante Erfahrung, für mich keine 5 Sterne.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Das Hotel ist schön. Der Strand hat uns auch sehr gut gefallen. Das Hotel liegt ein bisschen abgelegen. Wir würden wieder kommen.

reviews.title: Relaxation at its finest
reviews.text:
The resort provided exceptional service and high-quality food and beverages, which is rare to find in resorts in Vietnam. 

Although it was relatively quiet during the week, the staff ensured that we were well taken care of.

The only area for improvement, in my opinion, was the landscaping around the villas and the garden. Since everything is still new, it requires time for growth and maturity. Additionally, a recent storm caused some damage to the green areas.

Overall, I had a extremely positive experience.  Thank you, we will be back.

Mooie ruime villa met wat eigenaardigheden :

- de tweede badkamer is buiten en is op zich heerlijk ; lekker buiten douchen en badderen ; 
asr de afwerking is een beetje benden niveau in vergelijking met de rest van de villa 
- er zit een keuken in maar het is verboden om er in te koken (boete vnd 2.000.00) . Dit is te gek voor woorden . 
Verder is het resort nu ( september ) erg rustig maar dat is prima voor een paar dagen

reviews.title: Perfecte luxe villa met privezwembad
reviews.text:
Wij hebben ons zeer vermaakt in dit nieuwe hotel. De villa met eigen zwembad is prachtig, het uitzicht op strand en zee is fantastisch. De Spafaciliteiten zijn goed, betaalbaar met vriendelijke medewerkers. Het eten in het restaurant was goed.
Ze moeten alleen nog wat puntjes op de i zetten, je hebt pas na enige tijd door hoe je de douches op de  juiste temperatuur zet.  Een schepnetjes bij het zwembad om in de morgen de beestjes eruit te halen zou ook handig zijn, dit zijn allemaal maar kleine puntjes. Over het algemeen hebben we genoten en is dit hotel zeker een aanrader.
reviews.room_type: Two Bedroom Villa Private Pool Ocean View

reviews.title: Super mooi hotel
reviews.text: Geweldig hotel! Prachtige ligging direct aan een heel mooi strand. 2 zwembaden die ook geschikt zijn voor kleine kinderen. Huisjes zijn top en worden goed schoongemaakt. Personeel doet alles voor je. Enige nadeel is dat er helemaal niks in de nabije omgeving zit. Aan het strand zitten kleine restaurantjes maar het eten is echt basic. Aan de andere kant van de weg zitten hele ongezellige restaurants met ballenbak.

reviews.title: Rust en nog niet toeristisch
reviews.text:
Heerlijke dagen hier gehad. Wat een mooie plek. Genoten van het uitzicht op het strand en van de zonsondergangen aan de kant van de lagune. Eigen zwembad was heerlijk maar de andere zwembaden waren ook fijn om bij te zitten. 

Alles is goed geregeld. Het is nog niet heel toeristisch maar je kan goed in het hotel eten en in de omgeving kan je ook wel wat vinden aan de kant van de lagune. 

Zeker voor herhaling vatbaar. Dus zoek je rust en een relaxte sfeer op een mooie plek aan het strand vlakbij Hoi An en Danang, dan zal ik deze plek zeker aanraden. 

Ze hadden ook heel leuk een taartje gemaakt voor mijn man zijn verjaardag. Super lief!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
장점
1. 가성비 및 직원 친절도는 아주 좋아요. 
2. 조식 : 다낭내 비치 호텔조식과 90%일치
3. 가족 단위 조용한 여유를 누리고 싶을때 좋은것 같네요.
 

단점.
1.단, 외국인 입장에서 레스토랑에  가면, 메뉴를 현지인 메뉴를 요청 하지 않으면, 외국인 메뉴만 제공 하는 것은 바뀌어야 할 것 같습니다. (레스토랑 직원에게 이유를 확인한 사항) 외국 여행을 와서 현지 음식을 맛보고 싶어 하는 것이 당연할 것인데, 외국이라는 이유로 외국인 메뉴만 재공되고, 현지인 메뉴를 요청하지 않는 이상, 재공하지 않는 것이 이해를 할 수가 없네요.

2.레스토랑의 메뉴의 특별성이 없음. 
 조식에 나온 메뉴 그대로 90%이상 점심/저녁 메뉴로 되어 있음.

3. Private pool 의 수질 관리는 따로 요청이 없는 한, 숙박중에는 해주지 않던데 그것도  개선이 되어야 될 것으로 보입니다.

4. 해변가라 그런지 개미 및 벌레가 많음.

reviews.title: 아쉽지만 발전이 기대된다.
reviews.text: 아직 공사중인건지 아니면 어떤이유에서인지  풀 1개는 망가져서 흉물로 보이고, 그로인해  전체적인 분위기가 음산하다...객실수가 아직은 적어서 사람 볼수 없는건 좋으면서도 간혹 보이는 흉물? 로 인해 자칫 여기서 휴식과 편안한 느낌보다 불안한 느낌이 더 든다. 조식또한 다낭의 저렴한 호텔보다 못한 수준인건 사실이다. 나트랑이나 다른 리조트들 처럼 아파트형 객실을 만들어서 객실수를 늘려 사람이 조금더 있었으면 좋겠고 그로인해 부대시설 활용을 적극적으로 해주었으면 좋겠다.  다만 이런 단점에도 불구하고 가격메리트가 상당한건 사실이다. 가격대비 룸컨디션은 훌륭하다고 생각한다. 다만 우리가 묻고 있는 숙소 1가지 단점을 말하자면 거실 중간에 있는 파티션좀 제거 해 달라....왜?? 중간에 썡뚱 맞게 파티션??? 이해할수가 없다....

reviews.text:
It was nice trip for staying in the resort. There is pool in the house we were staying, beautiful beach and garden. 

But it was hard to communicate the staffs in english. It took time when we requested something. If they have a few staff who can speak english, it will be even great resort to stay for foreigner.  
Also They are not set to book the spa or room services by internet or TV in the room. It was hard to get information about them. 

Morning buffet is great and the menu changing every day is good! 

Beautiful View and resting in the roomc Everything is perfect!
